wine_experiences.name: DOQ Priorat Harvest Day (September)
wine_experiences.address: Camino Manyetes s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
wine_experiences.price_range: From EUR 90 per person including lunch and tasting
wine_experiences.description: Pick Garnacha and Carinena on llicorella terraces in September with a Priorat producer; sort, load and press, then a cellar tour and harvest lunch with the estate team.

wine_experiences.name: Garnacha Blending Workshop at Clos Mogador
wine_experiences.address: Camino Manyetes s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
wine_experiences.description: Blend Garnacha, Carinena and Syrah from separate Manyetes parcels to create your own DOQ Priorat; guided by the cellar team with a tasting of the final wine.

wine_experiences.name: Llicorella Soil and Wine Pairing Experience
wine_experiences.description: Geologist-led walk on black llicorella slate terraces explaining how the soil drives Priorat's mineral profile; paired with a 5-wine tasting from two estates.

wine_experiences.name: Cinc Pioners Vertical Tasting (1989 Revival Estates)
wine_experiences.price_range: From EUR 150 per person for guided vertical
wine_experiences.description: Seated vertical tasting of multiple vintages from two or more of the Cinc Pioners estates; a collector-level immersion in the DOQ Priorat's post-1989 evolution.

wine_experiences.name: Winemaker Dinner at Celler Val Llach
wine_experiences.address: Carrer de la Font 38, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
wine_experiences.price_range: From EUR 120 per person with wine pairings
wine_experiences.description: Private dinner in the Celler Val Llach dining room in Porrera paired to a tasting of the Val Llach and Embruix range with the winemaker narrating each dish course.

wine_experiences.name: Cartoixa Night Tasting by Lantern
wine_experiences.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
wine_experiences.description: Evening lantern-guided tour of the Cartoixa d'Escaladei ruins followed by a Scala Dei tasting in the monastery's surviving cellar arches; a theatrical historical immersion.

verified.address_quoted: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei

wine_experiences.name: Cooperativa Falset Harvest Celebration Weekend
wine_experiences.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_experiences.group_size: Open to all visitors during the Fira del Vi
wine_experiences.description: The annual harvest weekend at the Falset cooperative coinciding with the Fira del Vi; barrel sampling, press visits and a traditional Catalan harvest lunch in the Martinell wine-cathedral.

wine_experiences.name: Priorat Cycling and Wine Experience
wine_experiences.price_range: From EUR 95 per person including e-bike rental and tasting stops
wine_experiences.description: E-bike circuit from Falset through Gratallops to Porrera and back; three cellar stops with tastings and a picnic lunch on the llicorella terraces.

wine_experiences.name: Fira del Vi de Falset Tasting Experience
wine_experiences.address: Placa de l'Ajuntament s/n, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_experiences.group_size: Open event; tasting wristbands sold at gate
wine_experiences.description: The annual Fira del Vi de Falset is the principal public tasting event for DOQ Priorat and DO Montsant; producers pour at stands in the old town square.

wine_experiences.name: Mas Doix Old-Vine Vertical Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Vertical tasting of Mas Doix Salanques and 1902 across three or four vintages in the Poboleda cellar; the estate's century-old Carinena vines make each vintage a study in llicorella expression.
